findings.title: Unsafe Send/Sync wrapper bypasses borrow checker
findings.description: UnsafeSendCell manually implements Send and Sync for UnsafeCell, bypassing Rust's thread safety guarantees

findings.title: Non-atomic balance update in bank simulation
findings.description: Read-yield-write on shared BankAccount through unsafe cell causes balance corruption under concurrent access

findings.title: TOCTOU in ticket reservation
findings.description: Availability check and decrement through unsafe cell are not atomic, allowing overselling of tickets

findings.title: Non-atomic shared counter increment
findings.description: Read-yield-write on shared counter through unsafe cell causes lost updates

findings.title: Non-thread-safe global singleton initialization
findings.description: Flag-guarded static mut initialization without synchronization allows multiple initializations and data loss

findings.title: TOCTOU in inventory order processing
findings.description: Stock check and decrement through unsafe cell are not atomic, allowing inventory to go negative
